table.title: Table
table.pauseFailed: Couldn't change the AI DM's pause state.
table.emptyHint: Type an action below to begin the scene.
table.composerPlaceholderCombat: Combat is live — describe your action…
table.composerLockedStreaming: Another turn is active. Keep drafting; Send will be available when it finishes.
table.composerLockedPaused: The AI DM is paused. Keep drafting; Send will be available after the DM resumes it.
table.composerLockedHuman: A human has the DM seat. Keep drafting; Send will be available after handback.
table.composerLockedAwaiting: The AI DM is waiting on the table. Keep drafting; Send will be available after the table recovers the turn.
table.sendBlockedComposing: Finish entering text with your keyboard or input method before sending.
table.sendBlockedSubmitting: Your action is sending. You can keep drafting while it finishes.
table.sendBlockedConnecting: Connecting to the live table. Your draft is saved locally; Send will be available after the table state is verified.
table.sendBlockedReconnecting: Reconnecting to the live table. Your draft is saved locally; Send will be available after the table state is verified.
table.sendBlockedConnectionUnavailable: The live table connection is unavailable. Your draft is saved locally; reconnect before sending.
table.sendBlockedSessionLoading: Checking the current table state. Keep drafting while Send waits for verification.
table.sendBlockedSessionUnavailable: The current table state could not be verified. Your draft is saved locally; retry after the connection recovers.
table.sendBlockedBudget: The AI DM's token budget is exhausted. Your draft is saved, but Send is unavailable until the budget changes.
table.sendBlockedEmpty: Enter an action to enable Send.
table.discardDraftBody: Your action and scene text will be permanently removed from this browser. This cannot be undone.
table.draftStorageWarning: This browser could not save the draft for reload. Keep this tab open; closing or reloading may lose it.
table.viewerHint: You're watching as a viewer — only players can act.
table.systemTakeover: A human took over the DM seat.
table.offHint: No AI is running this table. The DM can switch on Driver mode in settings.
table.coDmHint: In co-DM mode the AI only proposes changes for the DM to approve — there's no live table to play at. Switch to Driver mode to seat the AI as the DM.
